blockers: WebSocket reconnection logic needs testing under flaky network conditions
content.title: Real-time Task Board UI

userStory.iWant: to see tasks on a kanban board that updates in real-time
userStory.soThat: I always have an accurate view of team progress without refreshing

acceptanceCriteria.given: I am on the task board
acceptanceCriteria.when: another team member moves a task
acceptanceCriteria.then: the card moves on my board within 500ms

acceptanceCriteria.when: I drop it in a new column
acceptanceCriteria.then: the task status updates and all viewers see the change

acceptanceCriteria.given: multiple users are viewing the board
acceptanceCriteria.when: a new task is created via API or CLI
acceptanceCriteria.then: the card appears on all boards automatically

implementationDetails: React DnD Kit for drag-and-drop with optimistic updates
WebSocket client with exponential backoff reconnection
Virtual scrolling for boards with 500+ cards using react-window
content.notes: Performance is critical — must handle 500 cards without jank on mid-range hardware.
